subject: Vegeta and Future Trunks (Dragon Ball Super) — duo portrait showing father and son side by side
description: Two male figures are rendered in a split portrait: on the left, a Super Saiyan with loose golden hair (consistent with the younger Trunks); on the right, a figure with upright spiky golden hair and more angular features (consistent with Vegeta). The composition places them side-by-side in close-up facing slightly toward each other, evoking a father-son pairing. The left figure's aura appears warm gold; the right figure has a cooler blue-white Super Saiyan Blue aura, suggesting a different transformation level. The overall framing is intimate and parallel, suggesting a collaborative or familial bond.
foreground: Two male figures side by side — left figure Super Saiyan golden, right figure Super Saiyan Blue with cooler aura
background: Soft warm gradient suggesting energy diffusion
